title: KEPLIN 36 Pack Children's Hangers, Plastic, Nonslip Baby Coat Hangers, Space Saving Tubular Hangers, More Storage for Kids Children Clothes Dresses (White)
features: Set of 36, great value set with good price. Save every penny.
Extra Features: Non-slip Notched design for kids clothing with straps like skirts, suntops etc. Easy and convenient to keep clothing in place, maximise your closet and save space.
High Quality: Made of high quality polypropylene environment-friendly material, solid and durable. Heavy duty and hard to break.

Dimension: 10.5"X6.1"(L X H), Fit for closet bar diameter ONLY LESS than 1.1 inch. Tailored for small baby from 0-2 years old(infant-toddler). The right size hanger will help keep baby clothes in great shape.
100% Satisfaction: We provide professional customer service before and after purchase no need to wait any longer and take advantage of it today!
description: From the manufacturer 36 pack nonslip nursery hangers is specially sized for baby's tiny clothes, notched shoulders help hold straps and accessories. The perfect baby shower gift. Durable construction, space saving design maximizes closet space. Unisex color, perfect for boy or girl and adds a perfect touch to baby's closet. When the right hangers are used in the right situations, clothing is protected from wrinkling, tearing, stretching, and falling. Great for all your nursery storage and organization needs. Heavy Duty Made of high quality polypropylene environment-friendly material, solid and durable. Heavy duty and hard to break. Slim Design Fit for closet bar diameter ONLY LESS than 1 inch. Tailored for small baby from 0-2 years old (infant-toddler). The right size hanger will help keep baby clothes in great shape. Measurements: 27x15.5 cm Extra Features Non-slip Notched design for kids clothing with straps like skirts, suntops etc. Easy and convenient to keep clothing in place, maximize your closet and save space.
